meta.title: FluencyCert - Prove Your English Fluency with a Verified Speaking Certificate
meta.description: Showcase your speaking club certificate, prove your English proficiency, and get feedback & reactions from the community.
meta.ogDescription: Upload your speaking certificate, share your journey, and let the community celebrate your progress.
meta.certificateDescription: View {name}'s English proficiency certificate on FluencyCert.
meta.landingTitle: FluencyCert - Prove Your English Fluency with a Verified Speaking Certificate
meta.clubsDescription: Find and join English speaking clubs in the community. Browse clubs, see member counts, and start your speaking journey.
meta.clubDescription: Join {name} speaking club on FluencyCert. Connect with members, earn certificates, and showcase your English proficiency.
meta.galleryDescription: Browse all available certificate templates for your verified English speaking certificate. Choose the style that best represents your achievement.
meta.termsDescription: FluencyCert terms of service. Learn about user accounts, certificate claims, community guidelines, and intellectual property.
meta.privacyDescription: FluencyCert privacy policy. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

hero.title: Prove Your
hero.subtitle: Join a speaking club, participate in sessions, and earn your verified certificate to showcase your English proficiency.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to get your verified speaking certificate.
howItWorks.step1Description: Tell us about your speaking club journey — your English level, clubs you've attended, and hours of practice. Our team reviews and verifies your information.
howItWorks.step2Description: Once approved, your personalized certificate is generated with your achievements. Choose from multiple templates to make it your own.
howItWorks.step3Description: Share your certificate page with the community. Other members can upvote and leave feedback — and you decide which feedback to feature on your page.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Built for speaking club members who want to showcase their English proficiency.
features.certificateDisplayDesc: Your personalized certificate showcases your English level, club participation, and achievements in an elegant design.
features.certificateTemplatesDesc: Choose from multiple beautifully designed templates to personalize the look and feel of your certificate.
features.upvoteRosetteDesc: Get recognition from the community. Other members can upvote your certificate to celebrate your achievement.
features.moderatedFeedbackDesc: Receive feedback from other approved members. You control which testimonials appear on your public page.
features.shareAnywhereDesc: Share your unique certificate page on social media, CV, or LinkedIn with a single link.
features.adminVerificationDesc: Each certificate is reviewed and verified by our admin team, ensuring authenticity and credibility.

showcase.title: Member Certificates
showcase.subtitle: See how members proudly display their verified speaking certificates.

testimonials.title: Loved by the Community
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from members who earned their verified certificates.
testimonials.text1: The verification process was smooth. I submitted my club info and had my certificate approved within a day. Now I share it on my LinkedIn and job applications.
testimonials.text2: We recommend FluencyCert to all our members. The certificates look professional with the template options, and members love the upvote and feedback system.
testimonials.text3: Getting my speaking hours recognized with a verified certificate pushed me to attend more clubs. The feedback from other approved members keeps me motivated.

cta.title: Ready to Showcase Your Fluency?
cta.subtitle: Join a speaking club, participate in sessions, and earn your verified certificate.
cta.freeTag: Free for speaking club members. No credit card required.

footer.description: The platform for speaking club members to showcase their English proficiency certificates and connect with the community.

gallery.title: Certificate Templates
gallery.subtitle: Browse all available certificate templates. Each certificate is personalized with the member's English level, club participation, and admin verification note. Choose the style that best represents your achievement.

templateDescriptions.guillocheSecurity: Classic security pattern with intricate background design.
templateDescriptions.modernGlass: Modern frosted glass design with elegant gold accents.
templateDescriptions.neubrutal: Bold minimalist design with thick borders and high contrast.
templateDescriptions.memphisRetro: Playful retro-inspired design with vibrant geometric patterns.
templateDescriptions.cyberNeon: Dark futuristic design with neon accents and grid overlay.
templateDescriptions.naturalGreen: Warm organic design with emerald tones and natural shapes.

myCertificate.title: No Certificate Claim Yet
myCertificate.noClaimDesc: You haven't requested a certificate claim. Go back to the home page to get started.
myCertificate.pendingDesc: Your certificate claim has been submitted and is awaiting review by an admin. You'll be notified once a decision is made.
myCertificate.approvedDesc: Your certificate is live and ready to share.
myCertificate.contactSupport: If you have questions, please reach out to support.

certificateControl.title: Certificate Control Panel
certificateControl.subtitle: Manage your certificate settings and community feedback.
certificateControl.templateDescription: Choose how your certificate looks. Changes are instantly reflected on your public page.
certificateControl.feedbackDescription: Review feedback from other users. Accept feedback to show it on your public certificate page, or decline it. Drag the ▲▼ buttons to reorder how they appear.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: When you sign up for FluencyCert, we collect your name, email address, and profile information from your Clerk account. We also collect information about your speaking club participation, including English level, clubs attended, and hours of practice.
privacy.section2Text: We use your information to create and display your verified speaking certificate, connect you with the community through upvotes and feedback, and improve our platform. Your public certificate page displays your name, English level, and club participation data.
privacy.section3Text: We do not sell your personal information. Public certificate data (name, English level, club participation) is displayed on your certificate page as you configure it. Feedback you leave on others' certificates is visible to the certificate owner and, if accepted, to the public.
privacy.section4Text: We retain your account information for as long as your account is active. You can request deletion of your data by contacting our support team.
privacy.section5Text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please reach out to our support team.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Text: By using FluencyCert, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.
terms.section2Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information when creating your certificate claim.
terms.section3Text: All certificate claims are subject to review and verification by our admin team. We reserve the right to approve or reject any claim. Providing false information may result in rejection and account suspension.
terms.section4Text: Users are expected to interact respectfully. Harassment, spam, or inappropriate feedback will not be tolerated. We reserve the right to remove content and suspend accounts that violate these guidelines.
terms.section5Text: The FluencyCert platform, including certificate templates and design, is our intellectual property. Your certificate content belongs to you and is displayed per your configuration.
terms.section6Text: FluencyCert is provided 'as is'. We make no guarantees about the accuracy or availability of the platform and are not liable for any damages arising from its use.
